results.title: Commissioners briefed on covered arena proposal
results.description: BRENHAM — Washington County Commissioners heard a presentation on Tuesday regarding a proposed covered arena project at the Washington County Expo.

results.title: Ladysmith, CVRD sign deal paving way for Saltair water supply
results.description: Residents in Saltair are one step closer to having a new source of treated drinking water. The post Ladysmith, CVRD sign deal paving way for Saltair water supply appeared first on CHEK .

results.title: Inside the "tariff whirlpool" with a brokerage manager
Alaska Air says business strengthened despite fuel price surge
results.description: CHICAGO >> Alaska Air Group returned to profitability in June with a double-digit pretax margin despite fuel prices running nearly 70% higher than a year earlier, CEO Ben Minicucci said on the carrier’s quarterly earnings call today.

results.title: Signal Hill Plots Big Makeover For Its Northside Oil Patch
results.description: Signal Hill has launched CEQA review for a 263‐acre overlay that could add about 1,000 homes, hotels and offices to the northern oil field.
